name: integration-tests
description: Integration tests to cover cases when the frontend works with backend together.

scripts.test:integration: npm run services:up && wait-on http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:3001 && npm run test && npm run services:down
scripts.test:ci: npm run services:up && wait-on http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:3001 && npm run test -- --reporter=junit && npm run services:down
